tasks.title: 教材中心－Header 全域搜尋無法使用
tasks.rootCause: .topbar__search-input in AppShell.js had no event listener at all
tasks.fix: Added optional AppShell.create() options.onGlobalSearch, wired to MaterialCenter's existing search pipeline via a new setKeyword() hook

tasks.title: 教材中心－格式篩選內容不足
tasks.rootCause: formats list in mock-data.js only had 5 options
tasks.fix: Expanded to 17 options; added real matching logic for 其他 (Other)

tasks.title: 學習總結－摘要內容未載入
tasks.rootCause: Not a Runtime-read bug — confirmed SummaryCenter.js correctly reads AHS.SummaryRuntime. Sections are genuinely empty because upstream KnowledgeBuilder/MaterialParser use Stub Implementation (no real document parsing exists).
tasks.fix: Distinguished 'no Summary record at all' (尚未建立學習總結) from 'record exists but stub-empty' (single honest consolidated message instead of five repetitive 尚無資料 blocks). No content fabricated.

tasks.title: Runtime Interactive Component Audit
tasks.result: All 13 named interactive elements confirmed either already fully implemented, or fixed to be fully implemented this round (Header Search, 格式). No additional silently-broken elements found.

regression.result: PASS — 0 console errors across all 9 pages, all prior-round fixes re-verified unaffected

nextSteps: Awaiting GPT PMO review of Round 4 deliverables

Recommended future Sprint (not this round): implement real document text extraction if Summary content richness is a priority; would require a new Architecture decision (parsing library / backend), not achievable under current Stub-only constraints
